title: Queens apartment fire kills 1, injures 2, including a firefighter, officials say
description:
An FDNY truck is seen in 2015. The FDNY and police responded to a Forest Hills, Queens fire where a woman was found unresponsive Friday morning. She was pronounced dead at the scene.
 

The FDNY said the firefighter is in serious but stable condition with inj…
content:
A fire in a Queens apartment building early Monday morning killed one man and injured two others, including a firefighter, the NYPD said.
A 911 call reported smoke and fire conditions at around 2:39… [+701 chars]
de:
Bei einem Brand in einer Wohnung in Queens sind ein Mann getötet und zwei verletzt worden, darunter ein Feuerwehrmann, sagen Beamte. Ein FDNY-Lastwagen ist im Jahr 2015 zu sehen. Das FDNY und die Polizei reagierten auf einen Brand in Forest Hills, Queens, bei dem am Freitagmorgen eine Frau leblos aufgefunden wurde. Noch am Tatort wurde ihr Tod festgestellt.
 

Das FDNY sagte, der Feuerwehrmann sei in einem ernsten, aber stabilen Zustand mit Verletzungen.
en:
Queens apartment fire kills 1, injures 2, including a firefighter, officials say. An FDNY truck is seen in 2015. The FDNY and police responded to a Forest Hills, Queens fire where a woman was found unresponsive Friday morning. She was pronounced dead at the scene.

la:

title: Denare Beach rebuilds, reflects on anniversary of devastating Sask. wildfire
description: Cautious optimism is mixed with concern in the northern Sask. community of Denare Beach, where more than 200 homes burned in last year's Wolf Fire.
content: Denare Beach residents are gathering on the shores of Amisk Lake to commemorate the one-year anniversary of the Wolf Fire, the massive wildfire that tore through the northern village and destroyed mo… [+4955 chars]
de: Denare Beach wird wieder aufgebaut und erinnert an den Jahrestag der verheerenden Zerstörung von Sask. Lauffeuer. Im nördlichen Sask vermischt sich vorsichtiger Optimismus mit Besorgnis. Gemeinde Denare Beach, wo letztes Jahr beim Wolfsbrand mehr als 200 Häuser brannten.
en: Denare Beach rebuilds, reflects on anniversary of devastating Sask. wildfire. Cautious optimism is mixed with concern in the northern Sask. community of Denare Beach, where more than 200 homes burned in last year's Wolf Fire.
la: Denare Beach aedificat, reflectitur in anniversario vastationis Sask. ignem ferum. Spes cauta cum sollicitudine in Sask septentrionali miscetur. communitas Denare Beach, ubi plus quam 200 domus in Lupo Ignis proximo anno arsit.

title: NASA-Funded Study Shows Wildfire Smoke’s Hidden Ozone Toll
description: Over the last decade, wildfires have worsened ground-level ozone pollution across much of the contiguous United States, creating unhealthy air far from active flames.
content: Wildfire smoke is stoking a new challenge for cleaner air. A NASA-supported study published Thursday found that, over the last decade, wildfires have worsened ground-level ozone pollution across much… [+5508 chars]
de: Von der NASA finanzierte Studie zeigt versteckte Ozonbelastung durch Waldbrandrauch. Im letzten Jahrzehnt haben Waldbrände die bodennahe Ozonbelastung in weiten Teilen der angrenzenden Vereinigten Staaten verschlimmert und zu ungesunder Luft in der Ferne von aktiven Flammen geführt.
en: NASA-Funded Study Shows Wildfire Smoke’s Hidden Ozone Toll. Over the last decade, wildfires have worsened ground-level ozone pollution across much of the contiguous United States, creating unhealthy air far from active flames.
la: NASA-Funded Study Wildfire Fumus absconditus Ozone Toll. Super ultimo decennio incendia silvestres pollutio ozono-aequalis per multam Civitatum Foederatarum contiguarum peior factae sunt, pestilentem aerem longe ab activa flammis creaverunt.
